steps.title: Read the graph directly
steps.content: This is a bar-graph lookup question. The horizontal axis identifies the group, and the vertical axis gives the number of books collected.

steps.title: Find group 1
steps.content: Locate group $1$ on the horizontal axis. Its bar reaches $30$ on the vertical axis, so group $1$ collected $30$ books.

steps.title: Confirm the free response
steps.content: The question asks how many books were collected by group $1$, not the total for all groups. Enter 30.
